message:
test(fcp-host): expand batch, resilience, and discovery via parallel subagents

batch.rs: 125 → 213 (+88 tests) — zone accessibility exhaustive matrix,
cycle detection, topological tiers, dependency_failed scenarios, serde.

resilience.rs: 155 → 210 (+55 tests) — circuit breaker window expiry,
bulkhead pressure, load shedder thresholds, EWMA convergence, health router
recovery cycles, ResilienceLayer execution.

discovery.rs: 185 → 241 (+56 tests) — cache validation boundaries,
ToolDescriptor edge cases, HostDiagnostics status priority, filter serde,
DiscoveryCache TTL, introspect_with_cache timestamps.

fcp-host total: 2843 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
